_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-29 23:09:12Z)**_

This diff modifies a static React mockup (`docs/vercel_mockup/src/MOCKUP.jsx` — the Vercel design mockup per the project memory). The changes are:

1. A hardcoded mock passenger entry added to component-local state (no external input).
2. A new `case` in a switch returning static color tokens.
3. A new local `statusFilter === 'govonly'` branch toggled by a local button click.
4. JSX text rendering of `m.idNumber` and `m.agency` (React auto-escapes text children; no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`, no `href`/`src`/`style` interpolation, no `eval`).

No entry points (network, IPC, file, CLI), no sinks (shell, SQL, fs, HTML-raw, eval, outbound HTTP), no authn/authz logic, and no flow from attacker-controlled input. The added `idNumber` ("PROV-BAT-08821") is a mock identifier hardcoded in the source — not real PII routed to a log/telemetry sink. The filter logic operates on the same hardcoded array. No regressions to any existing validator or guard.
